detectors.description: CustodyVault.deposit(address,address,uint256) (src/vault/CustodyVault.sol#62-82) uses arbitrary from in transferFrom: IERC20(asset).safeTransferFrom(from,address(this),amount) (src/vault/CustodyVault.sol#77)
detectors.markdown: [CustodyVault.deposit(address,address,uint256)](src/vault/CustodyVault.sol#L62-L82) uses arbitrary from in transferFrom: [IERC20(asset).safeTransferFrom(from,address(this),amount)](src/vault/CustodyVault.sol#L77)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in UnifyVaultController.deposit(address,uint256,uint256,address) (src/controller/UnifyVaultController.sol#148-213):
	External call allowing reentrancy:
	- IERC20(asset).approve(_treasury,quote.protocolFee) (src/controller/UnifyVaultController.sol#175)
	Balance read before the call:
	- vaultBalanceBefore = IERC20(asset).balanceOf(_vault) (src/controller/UnifyVaultController.sol#165)
	Possible stale balance used after the call in a condition:
	- vaultReceived != quote.netDeposit (src/controller/UnifyVaultController.sol#189)
		- stale variable `vaultReceived`
